title: Lead Instructional Designer at IDP Education India

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at IDP Education India
jsonLd.description:
Join the IDP Education India family as a Instructional Designer in Bhubaneswar. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About IDP Education India:
IDP Education India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IDP Education India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
